title: Iwebhusayithi ye-IATF
summary: I-website yemphakatsi ye-International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: I-IATF beyidzinga likhaya lemphakatsi lelicinile lelicacisa lomklamo, libala imiklamo, liphindze likhombe labo lababa nencenye esinyatselweni lesilandzelako lesikahle.
why: Leligatja ngumnyango wemphakatsi we-IATF. Lakhiwe njengephrojekthi lencane kute kube melula kufundza, kuhumusha, nekulondvolota endzaweni levulekile.
scopeIn: I-registry yemphakatsi yemiklamo ye-IATF leyemukelwe, lesebentako, kanye nalekhishiwe ngesimo, umgcini, sitolo, kanye nedemo
Emakhasi laphatselene nekuphatsa kanye nekusebentisa luhlaka
Kusetjentiswa kwe static ku Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Tindzawo temalunga langasese, ema-akhawunti, nobe kugeleta kwekungena
Kubamba ikhodi yemtfombo wemklamo, lehlala endzaweni yemklamo ngamunye
Kulandzelela tinkinga temiklamo ngayinye, lehlala ku-GitHub yemklamo ngamunye

title: I-selfie ye-IATF
summary: Sibonelo sekucala se-IATF, lesigcinwe ngemuva kwekufika endzaweni yemvelo yekuma.
problem: Kuhlolwa kwasekucaleni kwethulusi leligcile ekufinyelekeni ngaphasi kwesambulelo se-IATF.
why: Lencwadzi yekulondvolota igcinwa njengemculu wemsebenti wemphakatsi, ngisho nobe kutfutfukiswa kwemsebenti sekuphelile.
scopeIn: Luhlelo lwekucala lwethulusi leligcile ekufinyelekeni lolugcinwe njengemculu wemphakatsi

title: I-IATF bot
summary: I-bot yemphakatsi we-IATF, igcinwe ngemuva kwekufika endzaweni yemvelo yekuma.
why: Lencwadzi yekulondvolota igcinwa njengemculu wemsebenti wemphakatsi, ngisho nobe kutfutfukiswa kwemsebenti sekuphelile.
scopeIn: I-automation ye-Discord etinhlelweni temphakatsi we-IATF, igcinwe njengelirekhodi lemphakatsi
